zh.Diss, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可迪斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Battell於大約1304年出生在英國艾可時，他的父親William Battell31歲，母親Constance de Flamville25歲。他於大約1345年與Elizabeth Enfield在英國艾可奧加結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1377年在他的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可。

zh-hans.Diss, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰諾福爾可迪斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Battell于大约1304年出生在英国艾可时，他的父亲William Battell31岁，母亲Constance de Flamville25岁。他于大约1345年与Elizabeth Enfield在英国艾可奧加结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1377年在他的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Battell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Battle
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French de la bataile ‘(man) of the battle-array; warrior’. This name was taken to Scotland by a family from Umfreville, France, in the early 13th century.
Irish (Sligo and Mayo): adopted for Mac Concatha, ‘son of Cú Chatha’ a personal name meaning ‘hound of battle’ (where con is genitive of cú ‘hound’ + cath ‘battle’).
History: A John Battle from Yorkshire, England, settled in 1654 on the Nansemond, a stream in VA. His descendants became prominent in NC and GA.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Battell was born about 1304, in Essex, England, his father, William Battell, was 31 and his mother, Constance de Flamville, was 25. He married Elizabeth Enfield about 1345, in Ongar, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1377, in his hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Battell est né environ 1304, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, William Battell, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Constance de Flamville, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Enfield environ 1345, à Ongar, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1377, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Battell um 1304 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Battell 31 und seine Mutter Constance de Flamville 25. Er hat um 1345 in Ongar, Essex, England Elizabeth Enfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1377 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Battell è nato il circa 1304 nel Essex, England, il suo padre, William Battell, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Constance de Flamville, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Enfield circa 1345, nel Ongar, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1377, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Norfolk, England.

ja.Diss, South Norfolk District, Norfolk, E: イギリスノーフォルク
ja.lifeSummary: John Battellが約1304年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父William Battellは31歳，母Constance de Flamvilleは25歳であった。約1345年にイギリスエセックスオンガーでElizabeth Enfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1377年に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Battell(이)가 대략 1304년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Battell(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance de Flamville(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1345년 영국 에세스 옹가르에서 Elizabeth Enfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1377년 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Battell nasceu aproximadamente 1304, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Battell, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Constance de Flamville, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Enfield aproximadamente 1345, em Ongar, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1377, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Battell родился около 1304 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Battell было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Constance de Flamville, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Enfield около 1345 г. в местности онгар, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1377 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности норфолк, Англия.

sm.about 1304–about 1377: e tusa o le 1304–e tusa o le 1377

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Battell nació aproximadamente 1304, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, William Battell, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Constance de Flamville, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Enfield aproximadamente 1345, en Ongar, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1377, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Norfolk, Inglaterra.
